prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为337→342→335→280→276名，整体呈前移趋势（竞争加剧），近两年从335名前移至276名，累计前移约59名；2025年基准位次约2 76名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021–2023年约58–61人，2024年缩减至40人，2025年回升至41人；2026年计划仍为41人，与2025年持平，未出现明显扩 缩，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，2026年软科中国大学排名第5名，稳居全国顶尖高校前列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风及学校管理类事件，但抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高涨；历史投档异常方面，202 2年河南理科曾出现投档线暴跌，但对重庆考区直接影响有限；拥有哲学A+、理论经济学A+、中国语言文学A+、新闻传播学A+、数学A+、物理学A+、生物学A+、 马克思主义理论A+等27个A类学科，学科实力顶尖，对考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与复旦物理类 招生专业高度契合；重庆2025年物理类考生约139478人，2026年估算约136895人（略降约1.9%），考生规模微降对竞争有轻微缓解作用；省控线数据2026年缺失。复旦大学位于上海，属跨省报考，在重庆物理类招生约41人，占比较小但稳定；上海的地域优势对西南地区考生仍具较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次 持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、考生规模略降及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争较2025年略有缓和，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约281名，区间231–331名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 337→342→335→280→276 respectively, showing an overall forward trend (intensified competition). In recent two years, the ranking moved forward from 335 to 276, a cumulative forward shift of about 59 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 276. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was about 58–61 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 40 in 2024, and rebounded to 41 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 41, unchanged from 2025, with no significant expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranked 5th in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring students. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and school management, but its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, keeping application attention high. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2022, there was a sharp drop in the admission cutoff in Henan's science category, but the direct impact on the Chongqing exam area is limited. The university has 27 A-level disciplines, including Philosophy A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Biology A+, and Marxist Theory A+, showcasing top-tier academic strength, which strongly attracts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning well with Fudan's Physics Category enrollment majors. In 2025, the number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing was approximately 139,478, and in 2026 it is estimated to be about 136,895 (a slight decrease of about 1.9%). The slight decline in examinee numbers provides a minor easing of competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application. It enrolls about 41 students in the Physics Category in Chongqing, a small but stable proportion. Shanghai's regional advantages still strongly attract candidates from the southwestern region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in examinee numbers, and the somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will be slightly milder than in 2025, with a small backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 281, with a range of 231–331.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 231), one can focus on reaching for Tier 1 top classes like Xianghui Academy.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 61→63→71→61→75, with significant fluctuations, overall oscillating within the 61–75 range; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 75, the highest in recent years (relatively easiest to enter); the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's History Category was 8 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 12 in 2024, and adjusted back to 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 11, unchanged from 2025, with no obvious expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, with extremely strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents, but Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with sustained high attention for applications; in terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a sharp drop in the admission line for Henan Science Category in 2022, but the direct impact on Chongqing's History Category examination area is limited; it has a large number of A-class humanities and social science disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Law A-, Foreign Language and Literature A-, highly matching the History Category enrollment majors, with extremely strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is polarized and watchful but overall somewhat hot, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (Zhang Xuefeng effect), Economics is polarized and watchful; Chongqing's 2025 History Category candidates are approximately 73,373, estimated at about 72,105 in 2026 (a slight decrease of about 1.7%), the slight decrease in candidate scale has a minor alleviating effect on competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, belonging to cross-province applications, enrolling about 11 students in Chongqing's History Category, with very few spots, making rankings sensitive to fluctuations; Shanghai's regional advantage still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates in the southwestern region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation characteristics of History Category rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the slight decrease in candidate scale, and the somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that competition in the 2026 History Category will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 72, with a range of 52–92.
